grant_title: The Achelis and Bodman Foundation Grant
geographic_restrictions: New York City and northern New Jersey
project_area: Arts and Culture, Education, Employment, Health, Public Policy, and Youth and Families
demographic_requirements: Tax-exempt under Section 501(c)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code
eligibility_summary: Nonprofit organizations based in New York City and northern New Jersey that are tax-exempt under Section 501(c)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code and fall within the Foundation's program areas are eligible to submit an inquiry letter. Organizations outside these areas, those seeking funding for declined categories (e.g., endowments, capital campaigns, housing), or those significantly funded by government agencies are ineligible.
